data.label: Apache Cordova
data.description: Apache Cordova 是一个开源的移动的开发框架。它允许您使用标准 Web 技术——HTML 5、CSS 3 和 JavaScript 进行跨平台开发。Cordova 应用将在针对每个平台的包装器中执行，并依赖于符合标准的 API 绑定来访问每个设备的功能，如传感器、数据、网络状态等。

data.label: Apache Cordova
data.description: Apache Cordova is an open-source mobile development framework. It allows you to use standard web technologies - HTML5, CSS3, and JavaScript for cross-platform development. Applications execute within wrappers targeted to each platform, and rely on standards-compliant API bindings to access each device's capabilities such as sensors, data, network status, etc.
